title: Personalized Dad Mug | Custom Nutrition Facts Coffee Cup | Father's Day Gift | Gift from Kids
description: A custom nutrition-facts mug made for dads, grandpas, and father figures.
shortDescription: A custom nutrition-facts mug made for dads, grandpas, and father figures.
etsyDescription:
☕ Personalized Nutrition Facts Dad Mug

Looking for a unique Father's Day gift that will make Dad smile every morning?

This fun Nutrition Facts mug celebrates all the qualities that make him amazing—from strength and kindness to patience, dad jokes, and endless love. Personalize it with your preferred title and child name(s) to create a meaningful keepsake he'll use every day.

✨ Personalization Options

Choose your title:
• Dad
• Daddy
• Papa
• Grandpa
• Granddad
• Custom Title

Add child name(s) for a special touch.

Example:
Dad | Emma & Ethan

☕ Product Details

• 11 oz ceramic mug
• Professionally sublimated design
• Design printed on both sides
• Dishwasher and microwave safe
• Vibrant, long-lasting print
• Handmade by Rainbow Trove

🎁 Perfect For

• Father's Day Gifts
• Birthday Gifts for Dad
• Christmas Gifts
• New Dad Gifts
• Grandpa Gifts
• Dad Appreciation Gifts

📦 How to Order

1. Select your mug size (if applicable).
2. Enter your title (Dad, Daddy, Papa, Grandpa, etc.).
3. Enter child name(s).
4. Add to cart and checkout.

Example Personalization:
Dad | Emma & Ethan

📝 Please Note

• Colors may vary slightly due to screen settings.
• Personalized items are made to order.
• Please double-check spelling before placing your order.

Thank you for supporting a small business! ❤️
Rainbow Trove

title: Cat Floral Bookmark | Handmade Gift for Readers
description: A charming floral bookmark with cozy cat-inspired artwork for everyday reading.
shortDescription: A charming floral bookmark with cozy cat-inspired artwork for everyday reading.
etsyDescription:
Add personality and charm to your reading moments with these cute handmade bookmarks ✨

Featuring aesthetic and stylish designs including florals, cats, and cozy patterns, these bookmarks make thoughtful gifts for book lovers, students, teachers, journal enthusiasts, and readers of all ages.

Each bookmark is carefully handcrafted and designed to bring a little extra joy to your favorite books, planners, and journals.

Here's what makes our bookmarks special:

High-quality materials: Our bookmarks are printed on durable card stock and finished with a quality laminate for a sleek look and long-lasting wear.
Fully customizable: Can't find a design you love? No problem! We can create a bookmark that's uniquely you. Just send us your ideas and we'll bring them to life.
The perfect gift for book lovers: These bookmarks make wonderful gifts for any occasion. Birthdays, holidays, or just because - everyone appreciates a stylish way to mark their page.
Browse our selection of pre-designed bookmarks or contact us today to create your own custom design!

title: Teacher Stickers | Vinyl Decals for Planners, Laptops, Water Bottles
description: Colorful teacher stickers for planners, laptops, water bottles, and classroom joy.
shortDescription: Colorful teacher stickers for planners, laptops, water bottles, and classroom joy.
etsyDescription:
🍎 Teacher Sticker Pack | Standard & Premium Options
Celebrate the teachers who inspire, encourage, and make a difference every day!

This handmade teacher sticker pack features colorful, uplifting designs perfect for decorating water bottles, laptops, notebooks, planners, folders, classroom supplies, and more.

Whether you're shopping for a teacher appreciation gift, end-of-year present, student teacher gift, or simply treating yourself, these cheerful stickers add personality wherever they're placed.

📚 Choose Your Pack
Standard Pack (5 Stickers)
Includes:
• Teaching Is a Work of the Heart
• Little Minds, Big Futures
• Teach Inspire Repeat
• Teacher Life
• Teach Love Inspire

Premium Pack (8 Stickers)
Includes everything in the Standard Pack plus:
• Making a Difference One Student at a Time
• Fueled by Coffee & Patience
• Teacher Mode Off

✨ Product Details
• Handmade by Rainbow Trove
• Printed on premium vinyl sticker paper
• Matte laminate finish
• Water-resistant for everyday use
• Die-cut with easy-peel borders
• Vibrant colors and crisp printing
• Suitable for laptops, water bottles, journals, planners, notebooks, folders, and more

Approximate sticker sizes range from 2" to 3.2".

🎁 Perfect For
• Teacher Appreciation Gifts
• End-of-Year Teacher Gifts
• Back-to-School Gifts
• Student Teacher Gifts
• Classroom Supplies
• Laptop Decoration
• Water Bottle Decoration
• Journals & Planners
• Teacher Gift Baskets

📦 Packaging
Each sticker pack is carefully packaged in a protective sleeve with backing card, making it ready for gifting or personal use.

📝 Please Note
• Colors may vary slightly due to monitor and screen settings.
• Stickers are water-resistant but not intended for prolonged outdoor exposure.
• Handmade items may have slight variations that make each pack unique.

🍎 Designed and handmade with care by Rainbow Trove.

Thank you for supporting a small business! ✨

title: Personalized Slate Coasters Set of 4 - 4 Inch, Alcohol-Themed
description: A set of personalized slate coasters with playful bar-inspired designs.
shortDescription: A set of personalized slate coasters with playful bar-inspired designs.
etsyDescription:
Introducing our Etched Slate Coasters, the perfect blend of functionality and charm for your home or bar! This set features four 4-inch coasters meticulously crafted from slate, each adorned with clever and engaging alcohol-themed etchings.

Made to impress, these coasters not only protect your surfaces from condensation but also add a touch of wit to your gatherings. The alcohol-related text etchings make them a delightful conversation starter while keeping your tabletops pristine.

title: Personalized Ceramic Coasters - Set of 4 - Choose Your Design
description: A polished ceramic coaster set with design options for gifting or everyday use.
shortDescription: A polished ceramic coaster set with design options for gifting or everyday use.
etsyDescription:
Elevate your table settings with our exquisite Ceramic Round/Square Coasters! Our sets include four beautifully crafted coasters, each measuring 3.5 inches in diameter and made from high-quality ceramic. Featuring multiple designs, these coasters not only protect your surfaces but also add a touch of modern elegance to your home decor.

Crafted with durability in mind, these coasters offer a stylish solution for safeguarding your furniture from water rings and scratches caused by drinkware. Perfect for entertaining or everyday use, they make a thoughtful housewarming gift or a chic addition to your own space.

title: MDF Car Coasters 2 pack - Stylish Designs for Cup Holders
description: A practical two-pack of printed car coasters for cup holders and daily drives.
shortDescription: A practical two-pack of printed car coasters for cup holders and daily drives.
etsyDescription:
Upgrade your car's interior with our stylish and practical MDF car coasters! This set includes 2 absorbent cup holder inserts designed to fit most standard car cup holders. Made from high-quality MDF material, these coasters are durable and easy to clean. There are multiple designs to choose from which can add a modern touch to your car while protecting your cup holders from spills and condensation. Perfect for keeping your beverages stable and your car looking fresh!
Features:
	•	Set of 2 MDF car coasters
	•	Absorbent and durable
	•	Multiple designs
	•	Fits most standard car cup holders
	•	Easy to clean
Dimensions:
Diameter: 2.56 inches (6.5 cm)
Thickness: 0.24 inches (0.6 cm)
Materials: MDF (Medium Density Fiberboard)
Care Instructions:
Wipe clean with a damp cloth.

title: Neoprene Car Coasters - Set of 2 - Choose Your Design - Cup Holder Inserts
description: Soft neoprene car coasters that add personality while protecting cup holders.
shortDescription: Soft neoprene car coasters that add personality while protecting cup holders.
etsyDescription:
Tired of boring car coasters or stained cup holders in your car? Add a touch of personality and protect your cup holders from spills and condensation with our custom printed car coasters!  These beauties are designed to  absorb moisture, prevent scratches, and make your car's interior unique.

Each coaster is 2.75 inches in diameter, perfect for most car cup holders.  We offer a vast selection of designs to suit any taste.  Select from the design choices which are growing.

Here's why you'll love our custom car coasters:

Superior absorption: Made from Neoprene to keep your cup holders dry, protected and noise free from vibrations.
Customizable designs: Choose from our multiple designs.
Durable and long-lasting: Our coasters are built to withstand everyday wear and tear.
Easy to clean: Cleaning instructions are provided with our product.

title: Custom PU Leather Phone Wallet: Personalized Card Holder
description: A personalized phone wallet for cards, IDs, and small essentials on the go.
shortDescription: A personalized phone wallet for cards, IDs, and small essentials on the go.
etsyDescription:
Keep your essentials handy with this **custom leather phone wallet**! Designed to stick securely to the back of your phone, it holds credit cards, IDs, and cash while adding a stylish touch with custom-printed designs. Personalize it with your name, initials, or a unique pattern!  

**✨ Features:**  
✔️ High-quality **PU leather**  
✔️ **Strong adhesive** sticks to most phone cases  
✔️ Holds **1-2 cards securely**  
✔️ Custom printed with **designs, names, or initials**  
✔️ Slim, lightweight & durable  

**🎨 Personalization Options:**  
- Choose from our **exclusive designs** or send your own artwork!  
- Add a **name or initials** for a unique touch.  
- Available in multiple colors (mention color options if applicable).  

**📱 Compatibility:**  
- Works with most smartphones and phone cases (excluding silicone or textured cases).  
- Compatible with iPhone, Samsung, Google Pixel, and more.
